semrush.name: Semrush Affiliate Program
semrush.commission: Up to $200 per sale + $10 per free trial activation
semrush.notes: Hosted on Impact Radius. May redirect to app.impact.com/campaign-promo-signup. Expect a multi-step signup: account creation first, then media-property association.

hostinger.name: Hostinger Affiliates
hostinger.notes: Fast approval. One of the highest-paying web-hosting programs. Requires a short description of how you will promote.

ahrefs.name: Ahrefs Affiliate Program
ahrefs.notes: FirstPromoter account required. Recurring = every renewal, for life of customer. Strong manual review — link working content to your application.

frase.name: Frase Partners
frase.notes: AI content tool — pairs well with SEO niches. FirstPromoter-based signup is short.

clickbank.name: ClickBank Marketplace
clickbank.notes: Instant account creation — affiliate access is automatic. You'll need tax info (W-9 for US) before first payout. Massive marketplace of health/wellness/fitness products — directly relevant to the menopause + fitover35 brands.
